$schema: self-describing architecture map; read this BEFORE excavating the codebase
app: ARGUS - crypto due-diligence engine (@handle/token -> evidence -> scored verdict)
maintenance: Update this file in the SAME commit as any architecture-level change (new adapter, pipeline stage, budget constant, invariant, env var). Line anchors drift; trust names over numbers and re-grep when precision matters.

units.client: Vite React SPA in src/ (entry src/main.tsx -> src/App.tsx phase-router; pages lazy-loaded)
units.apiRoutes: ~55 Vercel serverless functions in api/*.ts; underscore files (_collector.js, _auth.ts, _provenance.ts, _cache.js, _graph.ts) are shared internals, not routes
units.serverEngine: server/ (orchestrator + adapters + analyst agent), bundled by scripts/build-collector.mjs (esbuild, entry server/_entry.ts) into api/_collector.js; API routes import the BUNDLE, never server/ source. Rebuild with `npm run build` after server/ edits
units.db: Supabase Postgres via PostgREST + RPCs; migrations in supabase/migrations/

topology.personAuditFlow: client SSE -> api/audit.ts (requireArgusAuth + consumeInvestigationQuota, config.maxDuration=600) -> runAudit(handle, emit, {organizationId, analystDeadlineAt}) in server/orchestrate.ts -> adapters -> analyst -> persistServerDossier (api/_provenance.ts persist_report_version_bundle RPC) -> SSE done
topology.tokenAuditFlow: src/token/audit.ts auditToken() (bundled into _collector + _sweep) serves api/v1/token.ts and the token UI

keyRoutes.api/audit.ts: authenticated person-investigation SSE stream (the core pipeline entry)
keyRoutes.api/health.ts: zero-spend provider-readiness + extraction-routing diagnostic (check env wiring here before spending on a test audit)
keyRoutes.api/sweep.ts: manual watchlist sweep; deliberately NO cron
keyRoutes.forensicFamily: arkham*, deployer*, evm-*, holders, bytecode, site-infra, sanctions*, legal-screen, news, pfp-check, recon-team, find-wallet, vc-portfolio, project-docs, namesake, cryptorank

stagesOrdered: budget-setup: analystDeadlineAt, collectionDeadlineAt = analystDeadline - COLLECTION_ANALYST_RESERVE_MS, graphScreenDeadlineAt = collectionDeadline + TRUST_GRAPH_SCREEN_RESERVE_MS

cold-intake: resolveProfile (twitterapi) -> projectTokenPass (coingecko/dexscreener/geckoterminal) -> parallel token enrichment (DeFiLlama tvl/fees/funding, holder profile, CryptoRank unlocks, security audits, Monid) -> coldIntake posts/claims/team
adapter-lanes: 3 concurrent lanes (IDENTITY: x/github/pdl/offchain, TOKEN: dexscreener/coingecko, WALLET: onchain); serial within lane; ARGUS_SERIAL_ADAPTERS collapses
basic-facts: runs ALONE post-barrier (Claude web_search discovery; the dominant cost line); KB read-through when ARGUS_ENTITY_REUSE=on
founder financing / venture-token binding / SEC registry screen
role classification: providerBackedRoles ONLY (model role leads never route)
trust-graph: LAST collection pass AND a never-waive screen; runs in its reserved window past the general collection deadline
analyst: scanContradictions + analyzeSubject concurrent under analystDeadlineAt; fail-closed preflight
finalize: assembleDossier, checkTracker.completeness, prior-outcome delta, cost attach, org-scoped writeEntityFacts (verified facts only; legal/sanctions/adverse EXCLUDED)

budgetModel.invariant: COLLECTION_ANALYST_RESERVE_MS - TRUST_GRAPH_SCREEN_RESERVE_MS >= ANALYST_SCORING_TIMEOUT_MS (250-60=190>=180); tested in src/lib/investigationRuntime.test.ts

adapters.registry: ADAPTERS in server/orchestrate.ts (~:180); retired-but-present: crunchbase.ts, reddit.ts; bitquery = reserved credential, never runs

basicFacts.ts.flags: ARGUS_BASIC_FACTS_PRIMARY=grounded (Serper+fetch+cheap-extract lane, falls through when unprovisioned) or =grok; ARGUS_BASIC_FACTS_REPAIR=grok; ARGUS_ENTITY_REUSE=on

groundedSearch.ts.via: Serper SERP ($1/1k) + page fetch + cheap extract (ARGUS_EXTRACT_MODEL; OpenRouter+ZDR when model is a provider/model slug e.g. google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite)

securityAudits.ts.collects: auditor self-attestation (subject pages, unioned across candidates) + auditor-domain corroboration hop
securityAudits.ts.note: selfAttested>=2 registry auditors arms the P3/P6 exceptional CEILING; known gap: PDF/Cloudflare-hosted audit reports don't fetch (iteration-9 spec)

defiLlama.ts.collects: TVL(+trend) / fees(+30d-over-30d trend) / funding rounds / audit links

tokenHolders.ts.collects: float control: top-10 holder %, LP lock/burn

priorOutcome.ts.collects: 'Since last scan' outcome delta vs latest persisted version

offchain.ts.collects: news, US court captions, OFAC SDN exact-name screen, avatar

monid.ts.note: management profiles merge into webTeam as verified leadership rows (mergeManagementIntoWebTeam)

projectToken.ts.collects: canonical token binding via official-X/official-domain (never a name match)

portfolio.ts + fundScale.ts + investorDi.collects: investor I2 portfolio + I3 fund scale

coingecko/dexscreener/onchain(Helius)/si.collects: market data, rug signals, Solana wallets, site substance, /team fetch, archive corroboration, wallet resolution, reverse-follow references

adapters.sharedInfra: server/publicWeb.ts (fetch/normalize), server/cache.ts (provider_cache), server/entityStore.ts (entity_facts KB read/write, org-scoped, gated ARGUS_ENTITY_REUSE)

scoring.flow: evidence -> server/agent.ts (analyst) -> src/engine/audit.ts (deterministic engine) -> server/checks.ts + src/lib/scanChecklist.ts (completeness) -> src/lib/reportPresentation.ts (display)

analyst.transport: structured<T>(): Claude ANALYST_MODEL (default claude-sonnet-4-6) then Grok fallback, one deadline, forced single tool call
analyst.projectBands: deriveProjectStrengthBands: per-axis tiers none/assessed_null/adverse/emerging(40-69%)/solid(70-84%)/exceptional(85-100% of weight); validateAnalystVerdict REJECTS out-of-band project scores (triggers repair)
analyst.H2: floors only from strict verifiedFacts() with floorEligible!==false; recall/corroborated facts + press + audit self-attestation widen the CEILING only

engine.perRole: raw = sum(axis scores) + doxBonus(Confirmed 5/Probable 3; PROJECT always 0), then hard caps
engine.governing: most-severe verdict governs (AVOID>UNVERIFIABLE_IDENTITY>FAIL>CAUTION>PASS>INCOMPLETE); TIE BREAKS TO THE LOWER SCORE
engine.bands: PASS 70-100, CAUTION 40-69, FAIL 0-39; cap ceiling<=10 forces AVOID
engine.capEligibility: model_lead / artifact_verified===false evidence can NEVER trigger a cap or floor

completeness.gate: clearanceCoverage (src/lib/scanChecklist.ts): every applicable NEVER_WAIVE check recorded AND recordedPercent >= 75 (floored)

scoring.presentation: presentPublicReport: complete+band-matching -> DECISION-READY; partial+all-axes-supported+PASS -> PROVISIONAL; adverse+partial -> RISK SIGNAL; else INCOMPLETE. Score/verdict mismatch fails closed

dataStores.report_versions: immutable report snapshots; DB triggers block certified mutation; activate_report_version_with_graph promotes
dataStores.entity_facts: knowledge base: verified facts write-back every audit, read-through when ARGUS_ENTITY_REUSE=on; NEVER stores legal/sanctions/adverse; NEVER stores or reuses providerProjection facts (market/TVL/fee captures are regenerated free each run - reuse compounds stale duplicates)
dataStores.clientLocal: src/lib/auditlog.ts localStorage log (reconciled to ACTIVE version on case open)

modelRouting.ARGUS_ANALYST_MODEL: default claude-sonnet-4-6 (verdict quality-critical; do not cheapen without live label validation)
modelRouting.ARGUS_DISCOVERY_MODEL: defaults to ANALYST_MODEL; Haiku A/B REGRESSED recall (documented in server/config.ts) - do not lower casually
modelRouting.ARGUS_EXTRACT_MODEL: default claude-haiku-4-5; a provider/model slug + OPENROUTER_API_KEY routes via OpenRouter with data_collection=deny (ZDR)

envVars.checkWiring: GET /api/health reports key presence + extraction routing with zero spend; env changes require a Vercel REDEPLOY to take effect

costLedger.model: withCostLedger AsyncLocalStorage per-audit isolation; getCost() attaches full LedgerLine[] to the dossier; persist REJECTS a live dossier without an observed ledger
costLedger.recorders: addClaudeUsage (Haiku-vs-Sonnet by model), addGrokUsage (never books fewer sources than tool calls imply - xAI under-reports), addOpenRouterUsage (books ACTUAL usage.cost), recordSerper/Twitterapi/PdlMatch/Helius
costLedger.discipline: live audits cost real dollars (~$0.7-1.5 person audit); ask the user before batteries; never trust the in-app ledger over the provider invoice

qualityGates.npm run typecheck: tsc -b + server + api tsconfigs (NEVER bare npx tsc --noEmit; it skips 2 projects)
qualityGates.npm test: full vitest suite (~1880+ tests): engine fidelity, adapters, invariants
qualityGates.npm run canary:offline: 7 deterministic release cases, all providers intercepted, 0 unexpected URLs
qualityGates.npm run calibrate: 19-case golden verdict set; the safety net proving scoring changes don't inflate bad actors
qualityGates.ci: .github/workflows/ci.yml on push to main: db-gates (supabase test:db) + truth/typecheck/test/calibrate/canary/build
qualityGates.uiCopyPolicy: NO em/en dashes in authored runtime copy (also enforced in analyst output + truth:check)
qualityGates.evalHarness: server/evalHarness.ts + scripts/eval-harness.ts: record ONE paid live audit's provider traffic (headers never stored, sensitive params redacted) to eval/recordings/<slug>/, then npm run eval:replay re-runs the full pipeline offline deterministically against eval/expectations.json; --allow-live hosts create an A/B lane (e.g. Serper live vs frozen Claude discovery)

clientSurface.src/components/Report.tsx: flagship person/project report renderer (176KB; edit with care, fresh context)

invariants: H2: no score floor from soft evidence - floors only from strict verified facts (floorEligible!==false); recall facts, press, and audit self-attestation are ceiling-only

Never-waive screens (identity-resolution, ofac name+address, trust-graph-connections, founder-asset-distinction) must be RECORDED for clearance; trust-graph gets a reserved budget window so it is never clipped
resolved_name is NEVER set from an inferred/model name; legal+OFAC screens require a provider-resolved real person
model_lead evidence never routes roles, never triggers caps, never floors scores; it stays investigator-visible lead material
sanctions/legal are screened LIVE every run - never cached in the knowledge base (entity_facts write-back excludes them)
deploy prod ONLY by pushing main (Vercel git integration); never vercel --prod from a worktree; no cron jobs by design (sweep is manual)
no em/en dashes anywhere in authored copy (uiCopyPolicy + analyst validator + truth:check)
budget arithmetic: COLLECTION_ANALYST_RESERVE - TRUST_GRAPH_SCREEN_RESERVE >= ANALYST_SCORING_TIMEOUT; in-flight adapters are never abandoned mid-mutation
report versions are immutable (DB triggers); every audit runs in an isolated AsyncLocalStorage cost ledger; persist rejects a dossier without one
after editing server/, run `npm run build` to regenerate api/_collector.js - routes import the bundle, not source
